info.title: Geti Tune
info.description: Geti Tune allows to fine-tune computer vision models at the edge. It is a lightweight application that covers the complete model AI lifecycle, including advanced features for inference, model monitoring and data collection.

post.description: Add a new item to the dataset by uploading an image

get.description: List the available dataset items and their metadata. This endpoint supports pagination.
Get information about a specific dataset item

delete.description: Delete an item from the dataset

get.description: Get dataset item thumbnail binary content

schema.title: Response 200 List Models Api Models Get

get.description: Get information about a specific model

patch.description: Update the metadata of an existing model

rename_model.description: Change the name of the model

400.description: Invalid model ID or request body

409.description: Model is used by at least one pipeline

get.description: Get info about a given pipeline

schema.description:
Partial pipeline configuration update. May contain any subset of fields including 'name', 'source_id', 
'sink_id', or 'model_id'. Fields not included in the request will remain unchanged.
schema.title: Pipeline Config

switch_model.description: Change the active model for the pipeline

reconfigure.description: Change the name, source and sink of the pipeline

400.description: Invalid project ID or request body

post.description:
Activate a pipeline.
The pipeline will start processing data from the source, run it through the model, and send results to the sink.
Stop a pipeline. The pipeline will become idle, and it won't process any data until re-enabled.

get.description:
Calculate model metrics for a pipeline over a specified time window.

Returns inference latency metrics including average, min, max, 95th percentile,
and latest latency measurements over the specified duration.

400.description: Invalid project ID or duration parameter

schema.title: Response List Projects Api Projects Get

post.description: Create and configure a new project

schema.description:
Configuration for creating a new project. Specify the project name, problem type (classification, detection, 
segmentation), and label definitions.

classification.description: Configuration for a classification project that have 2 labels: cat and dog

detection.description: Configuration for a detection project that have 3 labels: Chardonnay, Sauvignon Blanc and Cabernet Franc

segmentation.description: Configuration for a segmentation project that have 2 labels: car and person

get.description: Get info about a given project

delete.description: Delete a project. Project with a running pipeline cannot be deleted.

409.description: Project has a running pipeline and cannot be deleted

patch.description: Update labels for a given project

schema.description: Labels to add, remove or edit

schema.title: Response Update Labels Api Projects  Project Id  Labels Patch

400.description: Invalid project ID or request body

schema.title: Response 200 List Sinks Api Sinks Get

post.description: Create and configure a new sink

schema.title: Sink Config
schema.description: Configuration for the new sink. The exact list of fields that can be configured depends on the sink type.

folder.description: Configuration for a local filesystem folder sink

mqtt.description: Configuration for an MQTT message broker sink

schema.title: Response 201 Create Sink Api Sinks Post

400.description: Invalid sink ID or request body

schema.title: Response 200 Get Sink Api Sinks  Sink Id  Get

schema.description:
Partial sink configuration update. May contain any subset of fields from the respective sink type
(e.g., 'broker_host' and 'broker_port' for MQTT; 'folder_path' for folder sinks).
Fields not included in the request will remain unchanged. The 'sink_type' field cannot be changed.
schema.title: Sink Config

folder.description: Change the output path for a folder sink

mqtt.description: Change the topic for an MQTT sink

schema.title: Response 200 Update Sink Api Sinks  Sink Id  Patch

400.description: Invalid sink ID or request body

409.description: Sink is used by at least one pipeline

200.description: Sink configuration exported as a YAML file

400.description: Invalid sink ID or request body

schema.title: Response 201 Import Sink Api Sinks Import Post

400.description: Invalid YAML format or sink type is DISCONNECTED

schema.title: Response 200 List Sources Api Sources Get

post.description: Create and configure a new source

schema.title: Source Config
schema.description: Configuration for the new source. The exact list of fields that can be configured depends on the source type.

ip_camera.description: Configuration for an IP camera source

video_file.description: Configuration for a video file source

images_folder.description: Configuration for a folder containing images source

schema.title: Response 201 Create Source Api Sources Post

400.description: Invalid source ID or request body

schema.title: Response 200 Get Source Api Sources  Source Id  Get

schema.description:
Partial source configuration update. May contain any subset of fields from the respective source type
(e.g., 'device_id' for webcams; 'video_path' for video files).
Fields not included in the request will remain unchanged. The 'source_type' field cannot be changed.
schema.title: Source Config

video_file.description: Change the video path for a video file source

schema.title: Response 200 Update Source Api Sources  Source Id  Patch

400.description: Invalid source ID or request body
Invalid source ID or source is used by at least one pipeline

409.description: Source is used by at least one pipeline

200.description: Source configuration exported as a YAML file

400.description: Invalid source ID or request body

schema.title: Response 201 Import Source Api Sources Import Post

400.description: Invalid YAML format or source type is DISCONNECTED

get.description: Returns the used memory in MB and total available memory in MB.

schema.title: Response Get Memory Api System Metrics Memory Get

post.description: Update webrtc input with user data

yaml_file.title: Yaml File
yaml_file.description: YAML file containing the sink configuration

yaml_file.title: Yaml File
yaml_file.description: YAML file containing the source configuration

DatasetItemsWithPagination.description: Dataset Items list with pagination info

id.title: Id
id.description: UUID of the label to edit

new_color.title: New Color
new_color.description: New hex color code, e.g. #RRGGBB or #RGB

id.title: Id
id.description: UUID of the label to remove

Model.title: Model
Model.description:
Base model schema that includes common fields for all models.
This can be extended by other schemas to include additional fields.

start.title: Start
start.description: Start timestamp of the time window

end.title: End
end.description: End timestamp of the time window

time_window.title: Time Window
time_window.description: Duration of the time window in seconds
